title: Gilded Age Restoration
description: Extensive restoration of a historic structure, including full stair rebuild and structural reinforcement of the porch and living space above. Installed concealed steel supports to preserve the original column design, repaired existing beams with steel reinforcement and through-bolting, restored drainage systems, re-chinked the foundation, and matched all finishes to the home's original period detailing. Required significant custom problem-solving to maintain historical integrity while meeting modern structural standards.
